__inputs.name: DS_LOKI
__inputs.label: Loki
__inputs.description: Loki datasource holding Cowork/Claude Code OTEL log events

description: Cowork (Claude Desktop) usage & cost analytics, derived entirely from OTEL structured log events in Loki (api_request, tool_result, tool_decision, user_prompt). No metrics required.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_model=~"$model" | unwrap attributes_cost_usd [$__range]))
count(sum by (attributes_user_email) (count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" [$__range])))
count(sum by (attributes_session_id) (count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.user_prompt" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" [$__range])))
sum(count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_model=~"$model" [$__range]))
sum(sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_model=~"$model" | unwrap attributes_output_tokens [$__range]))
sum(count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_result" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" [$__range]))
sum(sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_model=~"$model" | unwrap attributes_input_tokens [$__range]))

sum(sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_model=~"$model" | unwrap attributes_cache_read_tokens [$__range]))

sum by (attributes_user_email) (sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_model=~"$model" | unwrap attributes_cost_usd [$__interval]))

sum by (attributes_model) (sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_model=~"$model" | unwrap attributes_cost_usd [$__interval]))
sum(sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_model=~"$model" | unwrap attributes_cost_usd [$__interval]))

panels.description: Total cost breakdown per user, sorted by spending.

targets.expr: sum by (attributes_user_email) (sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | unwrap attributes_cost_usd [$__range]))

panels.title: Cost by User

targets.expr: sum by (attributes_model) (sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_model=~"$model" | unwrap attributes_output_tokens [$__interval]))

panels.title: Output Tokens Over Time by Model

targets.expr: avg by (attributes_model) (avg_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_model=~"$model" | unwrap attributes_duration_ms [$__interval]))

panels.description: All token types over time: input, output, cache read, cache creation.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_model=~"$model" | unwrap attributes_input_tokens [$__interval]))
sum(sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_model=~"$model" | unwrap attributes_output_tokens [$__interval]))

sum(sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_model=~"$model" | unwrap attributes_cache_read_tokens [$__interval]))

sum(sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_model=~"$model" | unwrap attributes_cache_creation_tokens [$__interval]))

panels.title: Token Usage by Type

panels.description:
Cache reuse efficiency: Cache Read / Cache Creation tokens.
>5x = excellent, 2-5x = good, <2x = poor.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | unwrap attributes_cache_read_tokens [$__range]))
sum(sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | unwrap attributes_cache_creation_tokens [$__range]))

panels.title: Cache Leverage Ratio

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (attributes_tool_name) (count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_result" | attributes_tool_name!="mcp_tool" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" [$__range])))

topk(15, sum by (mcp_tool_name) (count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_result" | attributes_tool_name="mcp_tool" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | line_format "{{.attributes_tool_parameters}}" | json mcp_tool_name="mcp_tool_name" [$__range])))

topk(15, avg by (attributes_tool_name) (avg_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_result" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_tool_name!="Agent" | unwrap attributes_duration_ms [$__range])))

panels.description: Number of failed tool calls (success=false) per interval

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_result" | attributes_success="false" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" [$__interval]))
sum(count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_result" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" [$__interval]))

panels.title: Tool Error Rate

panels.description: Percentage of tool decisions that were accepted.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_decision" | attributes_decision="accept" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" [$__range])) / sum(count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_decision" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" [$__range])) * 100

panels.title: Tool Accept Rate

panels.description: Average Agent tool latency (shown separately as it dominates other tools).

targets.expr: avg(avg_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_result" | attributes_tool_name="Agent" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | unwrap attributes_duration_ms [$__range]))

panels.title: Agent Latency

targets.expr: sum by (attributes_user_email, mcp_tool_name) (count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_result" | attributes_tool_name="mcp_tool" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | line_format "{{.attributes_tool_parameters}}" | json mcp_tool_name="mcp_tool_name" [$__range]))
sum by (attributes_user_email) (count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.user_prompt" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" [$__interval]))
sum by (attributes_user_email) (count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | attributes_model=~"$model" [$__interval]))

panels.title: API Requests Over Time by User

panels.description: Per-user breakdown: cost, tokens, requests, sessions, tool calls.

targets.expr: sum by (attributes_user_email) (sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | unwrap attributes_cost_usd [$__range]))
sum by (attributes_user_email) (sum_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | unwrap attributes_output_tokens [$__range]))
sum by (attributes_user_email) (count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" [$__range]))
count by (attributes_user_email) (sum by (attributes_user_email, attributes_session_id) (count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.user_prompt" [$__range])))
sum by (attributes_user_email) (count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_result" [$__range]))

panels.title: User Efficiency Scorecard

targets.expr: sum by (service_name) (sum_over_time({service_name=~"cowork|claude-code"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | unwrap attributes_cost_usd [$__range]))
count by (service_name) (sum by (service_name, attributes_user_email) (count_over_time({service_name=~"cowork|claude-code"} | json [${__range}])))

panels.title: API Requests: CLI vs Cowork Over Time

targets.expr: count by (service_name) (sum by (service_name, attributes_user_email) (count_over_time({service_name=~"cowork|claude-code"} | json [$__range])))

{service_name="cowork"} | json | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" | line_format "{{.body}} | user={{.attributes_user_email}} | model={{.attributes_model}} | cost={{.attributes_cost_usd}} | tool={{.attributes_tool_name}} | duration={{.attributes_duration_ms}}ms"

panels.description: % of tool decisions that were auto-approved without human review. High % = team trusts auto-mode. Low % = team reviews manually.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_decision" | attributes_approval_type="automatic" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" [$__range])) / sum(count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_decision" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" [$__range])) * 100

panels.title: Auto-Approval Rate %

panels.description: Manual = user explicitly approved/rejected. Automatic = pre-configured permissions or auto-mode.

targets.expr: sum by (attributes_approval_type) (count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_decision" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" [$__range]))

panels.title: Manual vs Auto Breakdown

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_decision" | attributes_approval_type="automatic" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" [$__interval]))
sum(count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_decision" | attributes_approval_type="manual" | attributes_user_email=~"$user_email" [$__interval]))

panels.title: Auto vs Manual Approvals Over Time

panels.description: Security/compliance view: which users run mostly in auto-mode vs reviewing every action.

targets.expr: sum by (attributes_user_email) (count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_decision" | attributes_approval_type="automatic" [$__range]))
sum by (attributes_user_email) (count_over_time({service_name="cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.tool_decision" | attributes_approval_type="manual" [$__range]))

panels.title: Approval Mode by User

title: Cowork (Claude Desktop) — Usage & Cost Analytics
